message:
feat(lab): add spork conformance test suite (bd-2yffk)

13 conformance tests verifying SporkAppHarness lifecycle, oracle pass,
determinism, quiescence, schema stability, and scenario runner integration.
Includes schedule_children() helper for lab runtime child task scheduling.
